case_title: ERIC WARNER VS. THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-23-2011 CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, ERIC #P76584 ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARNER, ERIC #P76584 AS TO DEFENDANT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DOES 1 TO 1000 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-23-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2011

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCT-12-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. ATTY. ALWEISS TO NOTIFY OPPOSING PARTY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER (TO COMPLAINT) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE EXHIBITS TO THE COMPLAINT MAKE CLEAR THE CONTRACT ALLEGEDLY BREACHED WAS BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND THE SAN FRANCISCO DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OFFICE. THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA IS NOT A PARTY TO THE AGREEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2011 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER (TO COMPLAINT).

APPEARANCES: Daniel B. Alweiss, Deputy City Atty 703-1276 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant State of California's demurrer to complaint is sustained without leave to amend. The exhibits to the complaint make clear the contract allegedly breached was between plaintiff and the San Francisco District Attorney's office. The State of California is not a party to the agreement. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Continued To Oct-12-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL B. ALWEISS, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 703-1276 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - COURTESY COPIES OF MOVING PAPERS WERE DELIVERED AT THE HEARING. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS : Defendant State of California's demurrer to complaint is continued to October 12, 2011 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. Atty. Alweiss to notify opposing party. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Continued To Nov-04-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
